docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. AS TO DEFENDANT MANSFIELD, ZACK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
